architecture.summary: CLI command in src/cli/commands/sync-setup.ts, reuses existing writeSyncConfig() and setupIssueTracker(); scanMisplacedRepos() added to path-utils.ts; barrel-exported from init/index.ts; misplacedRepos threaded through NextStepsContext

integrations.summary: Integrates with GitHub Issues, JIRA, ADO via existing issue-tracker helpers; writeSyncConfig writes .env + config.json; works with umbrella per-repo sync targets

ui-ux.summary: Interactive terminal wizard using @inquirer/prompts (checkbox for providers, select for permission preset); warning block rendered in next-steps.ts after init footer with exact mkdir/mv fix command

performance.summary: No perf concerns — init-time only; scanMisplacedRepos scans single fs level, same cost as scanUmbrellaRepos

security.summary: Credentials collected via @inquirer/prompts password fields (masked); written to .env only, not config.json; --quick flag prevents interactive prompts in CI

edge-cases.summary: Non-TTY environment handled by --quick flag; missing config.json guarded with clear error; repos at depth 0 or depth 3+ ignored; empty repositories/ dir returns no warning
